landing_hero_subtitle: Preserving human craft through verifiable provenance, decentralized identity, and permanent digital heritage.
landing_mission_body: SkillChain combines decentralized identity and tamper-proof provenance infrastructure to preserve human craftsmanship across generations.
artworks_hero_title: Authenticated cultural artifacts with immutable ownership history.
artworks_hero_body: Browse blockchain-certified artisan works secured through decentralized identity, provenance anchoring, and x402-native acquisition infrastructure.
artworks_featured_body: This authenticated cultural artifact is anchored through decentralized identity, blockchain provenance, and tamper-resistant archival infrastructure.
artworks_description: This authenticated cultural artifact is anchored through decentralized identity infrastructure and blockchain-based provenance verification to preserve ownership integrity across generations.
institutions_heading: Trusted infrastructure for preserving cultural provenance.
artisan_intro: SkillChain registers artisans, craftspeople, and heritage creators into a verified cultural archive where identity, authorship, and provenance ownership can endure beyond the marketplace.
artisan_registry_heading: A respectful record for living human craftsmanship
artisan_card_identity_value: The artisan is represented as a verified human creator.
artisan_card_ownership_value: Future works can be tied back to their rightful maker.
artisan_card_institutional_trust_value: Approval and legitimacy can be confirmed through trusted issuers.
artisan_card_permanence_value: Authorship is prepared for durable blockchain-backed provenance.
artisan_registration_body: Register the artisan identity that should be protected, represented, and prepared for provenance ownership across future works.
artisan_name_placeholder: Name of the artisan or heritage creator
artisan_place_placeholder: City, district, state, or cultural region
artisan_did_body: Approval creates a decentralized identity for the artisan. That DID becomes the public authorship layer through which future artworks and records can be verified as belonging to a real human maker.
artisan_provenance_body: This is not just a profile. It is the foundation for ownership of provenance, so every future registration can point back to the creator who made the work and the tradition from which it came.
artisan_step_1_detail: Your name, craft, and place of practice are recorded in SkillChain's registry.
artisan_step_2_detail: An institutional or administrative verifier reviews the artisan record.
artisan_step_3_detail: An approved artisan receives a decentralized identity and a permanent provenance anchor.
artisan_step_4_detail: Registered works can then be anchored to the verified creator identity.
artisan_pillar_1_detail: Every approved artisan receives a DID-backed public record of authorship.
artisan_pillar_2_detail: Future artworks can be linked to the creator who made them, not just the file that represents them.
artisan_pillar_3_detail: Anchoring on Algorand preserves a tamper-resistant timeline of authenticity.
artisan_pillar_4_detail: Metadata persistence on IPFS supports durable cultural memory and verification.
artisan_institutional_heading: Built for institutions onboarding real artisans
artisan_institutional_body: SkillChain is designed for cultural organizations, heritage programs, artisan collectives, and institutions that need a respectful and verifiable way to register the creators they represent. The artisan is not reduced to a user account. They are entered into a durable trust infrastructure.
verification_intro: SkillChain verifies artwork, certificates, and cultural records by tracing authenticity back to a real creator identity, an anchored provenance trail, and a durable trust record.
verification_portal_body: Upload an artwork image, certificate, or archival record. SkillChain will validate authenticity, trace its provenance, and reveal the verified identity attached to that cultural artifact.
verification_upload_label: Drop artwork, certificate, or provenance image
verification_upload_sublabel: Museum record, artisan certificate, or registered artwork
verification_preview_body: Your uploaded work will appear here before its creator record and provenance trail are revealed.
onboarding_digilocker_body: Link your government-verified identity to your SkillChain profile.
onboarding_start_body: We will redirect you to DigiLocker to fetch your verified demographic details.
onboarding_consent_body: Allow SkillChain to access your name, DOB, and address for identity binding.
onboarding_linked_body: Your DigiLocker identity has been successfully linked to your artisan profile.
